text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, this isn't fun at all! I'm done! I don't care
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Forget all this boring stuff! Let's go get a parfait!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph! I don't care! I wasn't even trying today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So why should I be upset? No chance!
choice_data_list: I think you did a really good job.

Let's review your performance and plan for the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But... But... It didn't feel good. At all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll be a witch at this rate! This is
cruddy!
choice_data_list: It's okay. You'll win the next one.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Of course! Like I'm gonna let myself be a loser!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the next one for sure! And you! Get your
act together and help me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Isn't that your job?! Figure it out!
